zh.lifeSummary: 當John Woodbridge於1554年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁時，他的父親Reverend John Woodbridge30歲，母親Elizabeth Kingsman26歲。他於大約1579年與Jane Mercy Dudley在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1637年12月9日在他的家鄉享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Woodbridge was born in 1554, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reverend John Woodbridge, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Kingsman, was 26. He married Jane Mercy Dudley about 1579, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 December 1637, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

ko.lifeSummary: John Woodbridge(이)가 1554년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend John Woodbridge(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Kingsman(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1579년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 Jane Mercy Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 12월 9일 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Woodbridge родился в 1554 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reverend John Woodbridge было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Kingsman, 26.
